pos_sentences.text: Good faculty, senious are very good in nature
pos_sentences.name: Shreya Pandey

pos_sentences.text: Digital class room are there, hostel are very good
pos_sentences.name: Shreya Pandey

pos_sentences.text: Good learning opportunities for students who want to learn in their life
pos_sentences.name: Manjeet Kaur

pos_sentences.text: There are also well equipped labs and very enriched library and is hustle free and disciplined and the classes are regular. Apart it's far from student's politics unlike other universities. So person gets ample time for self study.
pos_sentences.name: Review guru

pos_sentences.text: Obviously one of the best parts is that it's placements and internships are very good and the exposure is also good. And the involvement of extra curricular activities adds to the overall growth of the students and helps to learn a lot.
pos_sentences.name: Review guru

pos_sentences.text: Hostel Facilities are quite good rooms are clean and campus is fully wifi enabled
pos_sentences.name: Shashank gautam

pos_sentences.text: Infrastructure of college, ground and internship
pos_sentences.name: MD BAHAUDDIN ANSARI

pos_sentences.text: Campus is green and alive, socially all students are rich
pos_sentences.name: MD BAHAUDDIN ANSARI

pos_sentences.text: Faculties are well qualified and active.
pos_sentences.name: MD BAHAUDDIN ANSARI

neg_sentences.text: Mess food, outing systrm not good
neg_sentences.name: Shreya Pandey

neg_sentences.text: Regular classes are not held in there campus
neg_sentences.name: Shreya Pandey

neg_sentences.text: Campus infrasturucture is not so good buildings not maintained properly
neg_sentences.name: Manjeet Kaur

neg_sentences.text: Staff is not so cooperative and takes time to respond
neg_sentences.name: Manjeet Kaur

neg_sentences.text: Hostel buildings are not so good and mess food is also not good quality
neg_sentences.name: Manjeet Kaur

neg_sentences.text: Canteen is not functioning properly and quality of stuff is very bad
neg_sentences.name: Shashank gautam

neg_sentences.text: Political organization is missing and political exposure is missing
neg_sentences.name: MD BAHAUDDIN ANSARI

neg_sentences.text: Some seniors are not good. They show their seniority on juniors.
neg_sentences.name: Anonymous

neg_sentences.text: Ther is this hierarchy system. As we have any complaint  we cannot go dorectly we have to reqch seniors as told by our seniors.
neg_sentences.name: Anonymous

neg_sentences.text: Class rooms can be more attractive. They looks like school classrooms.
neg_sentences.name: Anonymous
